databaseTree.tables: SELECT STRING(user_name, '.', table_name) AS TableName FROM SYS.SYSTABLE LEFT JOIN SYS.SYSUSER ON creator = user_id WHERE table_type = 'BASE' AND user_name NOT IN ('SYS', 'dbo') ORDER BY user_name, table_name;
databaseTree.views: SELECT STRING(vcreator, '.', viewname) AS ViewName FROM SYS.SYSVIEWS WHERE vcreator NOT IN ('SYS', 'dbo') ORDER BY vcreator, viewname;
databaseTree.procedures: SELECT STRING(user_name, '.', proc_name) AS ProcedureName FROM SYS.SYSPROCEDURE LEFT JOIN SYS.SYSUSER ON creator = user_id WHERE user_name NOT IN ('SYS', 'dbo') ORDER BY user_name, proc_name;

searchPick.tables: SELECT STRING(user_name, '.', table_name) AS TableName FROM SYS.SYSTABLE LEFT JOIN SYS.SYSUSER ON creator = user_id WHERE table_type = 'BASE' AND user_name NOT IN ('SYS', 'dbo') ORDER BY user_name, table_name;
searchPick.views: SELECT STRING(vcreator, '.', viewname) AS ViewName FROM SYS.SYSVIEWS WHERE vcreator NOT IN ('SYS', 'dbo') ORDER BY vcreator, viewname;
searchPick.procedures: SELECT STRING(user_name, '.', proc_name) AS ProcedureName FROM SYS.SYSPROCEDURE LEFT JOIN SYS.SYSUSER ON creator = user_id WHERE user_name NOT IN ('SYS', 'dbo') ORDER BY user_name, proc_name;

databaseObject.view: SELECT viewtext AS ViewDefinition FROM SYS.SYSVIEWS WHERE STRING(vcreator, '.', viewname) = $viewName
databaseObject.procedure: SELECT proc_defn AS ProcedureDefinition FROM SYS.SYSPROCEDURE INNER JOIN SYS.SYSUSER ON SYSPROCEDURE.creator = SYSUSER.user_id WHERE STRING(SYSUSER.user_name, '.', SYSPROCEDURE.proc_name) = $procedureName
